mapper.select: SELECT l.LECTURE_SN, l.LECTURE_NM, l.LECTURE_DURATION, l.LECTURE_TYPE_CD, l.SORT_ORD, l.OPNN_YN, l.LOCK_YN, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LECTURE_PROGRESS lp2 JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm2 ON cm2.USER_ID = lp2.USER_ID AND cm2.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND cm2.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' WHERE lp2.LECTURE_SN = l.LECTURE_SN AND lp2.COURSE_SN = l.COURSE_SN AND l.LECTURE_DURATION > 0 AND lp2.SECONDS_WATCHED >= l.LECTURE_DURATION ) AS CMPL_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED') AS TOT_MEMBER_CNT FROM LECTURE l JOIN CLASSROOM c ON c.COURSE_SN = l.COURSE_SN AND c.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} ORDER BY l.SORT_ORD ASC, l.LECTURE_SN ASC

SELECT cm.USER_ID, m.USER_NAME, CASE WHEN lp.SECONDS_WATCHED IS NOT NULL AND l.LECTURE_DURATION > 0 AND lp.SECONDS_WATCHED >= l.LECTURE_DURATION THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CMPL_YN, CASE WHEN lp.SECONDS_WATCHED IS NOT NULL AND l.LECTURE_DURATION > 0 AND lp.SECONDS_WATCHED >= l.LECTURE_DURATION THEN TO_CHAR(lp.LAST_UPDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') ELSE NULL END AS CMPL_DT, CASE WHEN lp.SECONDS_WATCHED IS NULL OR NVL(l.LECTURE_DURATION, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE LEAST(ROUND(lp.SECONDS_WATCHED * 100.0 / l.LECTURE_DURATION, 0), 100) END AS PROGRESS_PCT FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm JOIN MEMBER m ON m.USER_ID = cm.USER_ID JOIN LECTURE l ON l.LECTURE_SN = #{lectureSn} LEFT JOIN LECTURE_PROGRESS lp ON lp.LECTURE_SN = l.LECTURE_SN AND lp.COURSE_SN = l.COURSE_SN AND lp.USER_ID = cm.USER_ID WHERE cm.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' ORDER BY m.USER_NAME ASC

SELECT l.LECTURE_SN AS lectureSn, l.LECTURE_NM AS lectureNm, l.SORT_ORD AS sortOrd, CASE WHEN lp.SECONDS_WATCHED IS NOT NULL AND l.LECTURE_DURATION > 0 AND lp.SECONDS_WATCHED >= l.LECTURE_DURATION THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS cmplYn, CASE WHEN lp.SECONDS_WATCHED IS NOT NULL AND l.LECTURE_DURATION > 0 AND lp.SECONDS_WATCHED >= l.LECTURE_DURATION THEN TO_CHAR(lp.LAST_UPDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') ELSE NULL END AS cmplDt, CASE WHEN lp.SECONDS_WATCHED IS NULL OR NVL(l.LECTURE_DURATION, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE LEAST(ROUND(lp.SECONDS_WATCHED * 100.0 / l.LECTURE_DURATION, 0), 100) END AS progressPct FROM LECTURE l JOIN CLASSROOM cl ON cl.COURSE_SN = l.COURSE_SN AND cl.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} LEFT JOIN LECTURE_PROGRESS lp ON lp.LECTURE_SN = l.LECTURE_SN AND lp.COURSE_SN = l.COURSE_SN AND lp.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE l.OPNN_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY l.SORT_ORD ASC, l.LECTURE_SN ASC

SELECT LECTURE_SN, COURSE_SN, LECTURE_NM, LECTURE_TYPE_CD, LECTURE_DURATION, LECTURE_EXPLN_CN, OPNN_YN, LOCK_YN, PREREQ_LECTURE_SN, SORT_ORD, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID FROM LECTURE WHERE COURSE_SN = #{courseSn} ORDER BY SORT_ORD ASC, LECTURE_SN ASC

SELECT LECTURE_SN, COURSE_SN, LECTURE_NM, LECTURE_TYPE_CD, LECTURE_DURATION, LECTURE_EXPLN_CN, OPNN_YN, LOCK_YN, PREREQ_LECTURE_SN, SORT_ORD, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, ATCH_FILE_ID FROM LECTURE WHERE LECTURE_SN = #{lectureSn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LECTURE ( COURSE_SN, LECTURE_NM, LECTURE_TYPE_CD, ATCH_FILE_ID, LECTURE_DURATION, LECTURE_EXPLN_CN, OPNN_YN, LOCK_YN, PREREQ_LECTURE_SN, SORT_ORD, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID ) VALUES ( #{courseSn}, #{lectureNm}, #{lectureTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{atchFileId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lectureDuration, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{lectureExplnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{opnnYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), NVL(#{lockYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'N'), #{prereqLectureSn, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NVL(#{sortOrd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0), #{rgtrId}, #{lastMdfrId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE LECTURE SET LECTURE_NM = #{lectureNm}, LECTURE_TYPE_CD = #{lectureTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LECTURE_DURATION = #{lectureDuration, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LECTURE_EXPLN_CN = #{lectureExplnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPNN_YN = #{opnnYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, LOCK_YN = #{lockYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, PREREQ_LECTURE_SN = #{prereqLectureSn, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SORT_ORD = #{sortOrd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId} WHERE LECTURE_SN = #{lectureSn}
mapper.select:
SELECT l.LECTURE_SN, l.COURSE_SN, l.LECTURE_NM, l.ATCH_FILE_ID, l.LECTURE_DURATION, l.LECTURE_EXPLN_CN, (select seconds_watched from lecture_progress where user_id = #{userId} and lecture_sn = l.lecture_sn and course_sn = l.course_sn) as seconds_watched, (select last_update from lecture_progress where user_id = #{userId} and lecture_sn = l.lecture_sn and course_sn = l.course_sn) as last_update
FROM LECTURE l WHERE l.COURSE_SN = #{courseSn} AND l.OPNN_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY l.SORT_ORD ASC, l.LECTURE_SN ASC
mapper.update: MERGE INTO LECTURE_PROGRESS p USING (SELECT #{lectureId} AS lectureSn, #{courseId} AS courseSn FROM dual) src ON (p.LECTURE_SN = src.lectureSn AND p.COURSE_SN = src.courseSn AND p.USER_ID = #{userId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET p.SECONDS_WATCHED = #{progress}, p.LAST_UPDATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (LECTURE_SN, COURSE_SN, USER_ID, SECONDS_WATCHED, LAST_UPDATE) VALUES (src.lectureSn, src.courseSn, #{userId}, #{progress}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT sc.SUBJ_CL_NM AS "subjectName", NVL(SUM(lp.SECONDS_WATCHED), 0) AS "totalSeconds" FROM SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION sc LEFT JOIN SUBJECT s ON s.SUBJ_CL_ID = sc.SUBJ_CL_ID LEFT JOIN COURSE c ON c.SUBJ_ID = s.SUBJ_ID LEFT JOIN LECTURE l ON l.COURSE_SN = c.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN LECTURE_PROGRESS lp ON lp.LECTURE_SN = l.LECTURE_SN AND lp.COURSE_SN = l.COURSE_SN AND lp.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY sc.SUBJ_CL_ID, sc.SUBJ_CL_NM ORDER BY NVL(SUM(lp.SECONDS_WATCHED), 0) DESC

SELECT m.USER_NAME AS "instructorName", i.INSTR_PROFILE_IMG AS "profileImage", sc.SUBJ_CL_NM AS "subjectName", SUM(lp.SECONDS_WATCHED) AS "totalSeconds" FROM LECTURE_PROGRESS lp JOIN LECTURE l ON lp.LECTURE_SN = l.LECTURE_SN AND lp.COURSE_SN = l.COURSE_SN JOIN COURSE c ON l.COURSE_SN = c.COURSE_SN JOIN SUBJECT s ON c.SUBJ_ID = s.SUBJ_ID JOIN SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION sc ON s.SUBJ_CL_ID = sc.SUBJ_CL_ID JOIN INSTRUCTOR i ON i.INSTR_USER_ID = c.INSTR_USER_ID JOIN MEMBER m ON m.USER_ID = i.INSTR_USER_ID WHERE lp.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY c.INSTR_USER_ID, m.USER_NAME, i.INSTR_PROFILE_IMG, sc.SUBJ_CL_NM ORDER BY "totalSeconds" DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
